title: veronica linariifolia f. villosula
intro: Veronica linariifolia f. villosula, also known as the hairy broomleaf speedwell, is a plant species belonging to the Veronicaceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a diuretic and to help reduce fever. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including urinary tract infections and inflammation. The leaves and flowers of Veronica linariifolia f. villosula can be used to make herbal preparations, such as infusions and decoctions, which can be consumed to reap its health benefits.
